'''''Omicron 023''''' was a [[Mesens Corporation|Mesens]] [[SCT Scout craft|SCT Scout Craft]] that arrived at the meeting site between [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and [[Dunari]] to investigate the craft present in the system. Shortly after the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] arrived to capture Rebel and Dunari ships however they managed to flee. ''Omicron 023'' itself was destroyed during the skirmish.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
